results.releaseNotes:
* This update brings visual polish and under-the-hood improvements to make GIST feel even better every day.
* Added full support for automatic Light Mode and Dark Mode appearance
* GIST now follows your iPhone’s system theme preference
* Improved readability and visual contrast across key screens
* Refined overall interface consistency for a cleaner experience
results.description:
Every day, a new puzzle is waiting. Your job is to guess the one word that captures the essence of a paragraph — revealed one sentence at a time.

Each wrong guess reveals another sentence as a clue. You have 5 attempts. Simple rules, surprisingly tricky.

GIST is a daily word puzzle that takes less than a minute to play — but might stay with you all day.

How it works:
* One sentence is shown as your first clue
* Guess the one word that captures its meaning
* Wrong or close guesses reveal more sentences
* Solve it in as few guesses as possible
* A new puzzle every day

Features:
* Daily puzzles with varying difficulty — Easy, Medium, Hard, and Wildcard
* Puzzle archive to catch up on missed days
* Play past puzzles anytime
* Share your results with friends
* Personal stats including win rate, streak, and guess distribution
* No account needed — just open and play
* Free to play

Why GIST?
Most word games test your vocabulary. GIST tests something different — your ability to read between the lines, find the essence of an idea, and express it in a single word. It's part reading comprehension, part lateral thinking, part intuition.
New puzzle every day at midnight. Can you get the GIST?

results.releaseNotes:
* Added a new Home dashboard for faster access to common diagnostics
* Added Saved Targets for frequently checked domains, hosts, and IP addresses

* Improved sharing, copying, and export behavior across diagnostic results
* Fixed Swift 6 compatibility issues in Speed Test
* Fixed a certificate tracker crash caused by overlapping timeout and certificate callbacks
* Removed an iOS 17-only empty state view for better compatibility with older deployment targets
* General UI polish, reliability improvements, and bug fixes
results.description:
NetSleuth is a powerful network diagnostic toolkit for iPhone and iPad. Whether you're a developer, IT professional, or just someone who wants to understand what's happening on their network, NetSleuth gives you professional-grade tools in one clean, fast app.

* Speed Test
Measures your connection the way it should be measured. Tests download, upload, latency, jitter, loaded latency, and packet loss — then gives you a Bufferbloat Grade (A–F) showing how your connection performs under real load. Powered by Cloudflare.

* Ping
Ping any host with a single burst or continuous mode. Watch latency in real time on a live scrolling graph with color-coded results and timeout detection.

* Traceroute
Trace the full path to any host with live reverse DNS lookups showing real router and infrastructure hostnames at every hop.

* DNS Lookup
Query A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME, and NS records for any domain.

* DNS Propagation
Check if your domain has propagated across 10 major DNS servers worldwide including Google, Cloudflare, Quad9, and AdGuard.

* DNS over HTTPS (DoH)
Test whether your device is using encrypted DNS. Checks 6 major DoH providers and estimates your protection level.

* Port Checker
Scan common ports on any host to see what's open or closed.

* WHOIS
Look up domain registration and ownership details instantly.

* SSL Inspector
Inspect SSL/TLS certificates — view issuer, validity dates, and days until expiry.

* WiFi Info
See your local IP, external IP, subnet, gateway, and DNS. Enable location permission to reveal signal strength in dBm, SSID, BSSID, and channel with 2.4/5 GHz detection.

* IP Info
Geolocate any IP address with a map view, ISP, timezone, region, and coordinates.

No ads. No account required. No data collected.

results.releaseNotes:

results.description:
SnakeRush Arcade brings the classic snake experience to modern iPhone and iPad with smooth controls, clean visuals, and fast, addictive gameplay.

Guide your snake, collect food, and grow as long as possible—but don’t crash into yourself or the walls. The longer you survive, the higher your score climbs.

FEATURES

• Smooth swipe controls for precise movement
• Fast-paced, responsive gameplay
• Retro-inspired arcade design
• Track your high score and beat your best run
• Haptic feedback and sound effects for a satisfying experience
• Quick restart for nonstop play

PERFECT FOR QUICK SESSIONS

Jump in for a quick round anytime. Whether you have a minute or an hour, SnakeRush Arcade is easy to pick up and hard to put down.

CHALLENGE YOURSELF

Every run is a new challenge. Improve your reflexes, plan your moves, and see how long you can survive as the speed and pressure increase.

Can you master the grid and achieve the ultimate high score?

Download SnakeRush Arcade and start your run today.

results.releaseNotes:
* Added a new Progress tab to view your stats and recent activity
* Added achievements for streaks, strong performances, and daily completion milestones
* Added daily progress summaries on the Home screen
* Added best score and best streak tracking across all game modes
* Added lightweight completion history to better track your play over time
* Improved Trivia variety with better daily question selection
* Improved overall polish and completed-state feedback
results.description:
Daily Brain Games is your go-to app for a quick daily mental workout. Three unique puzzles refresh every single day, keeping your mind sharp and your streaks alive.

Anagram - A new word is scrambled for you every day. Tap the letters to unscramble it and solve the puzzle. Use the hint if you get stuck — but try without it first! The faster you solve it, the better.

Daily Trivia - Ten hand-picked questions drawn from a pool of hundreds, covering Geography, Science, History, Math, Art, Literature, Animals, Music, Food, Sports, Technology, and General Knowledge. A fresh set every day means you'll always be learning something new.

Memory Match - A 4×6 grid of face-down cards is waiting for you. Flip them over and find all 12 matching pairs. The fewer moves you make, the more stars you earn. Six different themed emoji sets rotate daily — nature, animals, fruit, music, space, and sports.

Features:
* Three daily games — one of each, every day
* Puzzles reset at midnight so there's always something new tomorrow
* Daily streak tracking for each game — build your streak and keep it going
* Completion lock — once you've finished a game for the day, it's done. No replaying
* Smart daily notifications at 8am — automatically cancelled if you've already played
* Fully supports iPhone and iPad with responsive layouts
* Works great on iOS 17 and later

How it works: Every puzzle is seeded by the date, meaning everyone around the world plays the exact same puzzles on the same day. Compare scores with friends and family — did you beat them on the trivia? Did they need fewer moves on Memory Match?

Daily Brain Games is free, clean, and ad-free. No accounts, no sign-ups, no subscriptions — just open the app and play.
A new challenge awaits you every morning. How long can you keep your streak alive?

* General UI polish and stability improvements
results.description:
ContactFixer solves a small but annoying problem: your iPhone contacts are a mix of formats. Some numbers have the +1 country code, some have area codes in parentheses, some are just ten raw digits. iMessage, FaceTime, and third-party apps all behave better when numbers are in a consistent E.164 format — and ContactFixer gets you there in seconds.

HOW IT WORKS
Tap Scan Contacts and ContactFixer reads through your entire contacts list, identifying every US phone number missing the +1 country code. It shows you a full preview — contact name, old number, and new number — before changing anything. When you're ready, tap Apply All Changes and every contact is updated instantly using Apple's native Contacts framework.

WHAT GETS FIXED
(708) 555-0142 → +17085550142
312-555-0198 → +13125550198
8005550167 → +18005550167
17085550031 → +17085550031

Numbers already beginning with + are never touched. Your international contacts stay exactly as they are.

COMPLETELY PRIVATE
ContactFixer has no backend, no account, no analytics, and no ads. It makes zero network requests — you can run it in airplane mode and it works identically. Your contacts are read and written using the same native framework Apple's own Contacts app uses. Nothing ever leaves your device.

SIMPLE BY DESIGN
There's nothing to configure. No settings, no subscriptions, no account to create. Scan, review, apply — done.

results.releaseNotes:

* Refined app structure and internal organization for better stability and future updates
* Cleaned up event categorization across live sky items, alerts, and event cards
* Improved settings and app metadata handling
* General bug fixes and UI polish
results.description:
Here's a full App Store description, punchy opening, feature breakdown, data sources, and a strong close:

The Earth never stops moving.
Earthquakes ripple through the crust. Solar flares erupt from the Sun. The ISS streaks overhead at 28,000 km/h. Wildfires ignite from satellite-detected heat. The aurora dances at the edge of the atmosphere.
Tremula monitors all of it — and puts it in your pocket, live.
What Tremula tracks:

EARTHQUAKES
Real-time seismic data from the USGS Earthquake Hazards Program. See every significant earthquake globally and every tremor near you, with magnitude, depth, and exact location — within minutes of it happening.

AURORA BOREALIS
Live Kp index from NOAA's Space Weather Prediction Center, updated every 3 hours. Know whether tonight is a 0 or a 9, and whether the northern lights might be visible from your backyard.

INTERNATIONAL SPACE STATION
Real-time ISS position, updated live on an interactive map. Watch it move. See how far it is from you, what region it's flying over, and how long until it comes back around.

ASTEROIDS & METEORS
Daily close approach data from NASA's Near Earth Object program, calibrated in lunar distances so you actually understand the scale. Plus the full annual meteor shower calendar — loaded offline, always ready.

WILDFIRES
Dual coverage from NASA FIRMS satellite thermal detection and NASA EONET curated events. See active fires near you with precise coordinates, straight from orbital infrared sensors.

FLOODS
USGS stream gauge readings near your location. When a river hits flood stage, you'll know before it makes the news.

SOLAR FLARES & SPACE WEATHER
X-class and M-class solar flares from NASA DONKI, plus coronal mass ejections headed toward Earth. When a fast CME launches, Tremula tells you aurora enhancement is coming in 1–3 days.

ASTRONOMY PICTURE OF THE DAY
NASA's daily image of the universe — a stunning reminder of the scale of everything.

Built on data you can trust:
Every number in Tremula comes from a government-maintained scientific source — USGS, NOAA, NASA. No scraped websites. No third-party aggregators. No paywalled data resold to you. Just the raw feed, beautifully presented.

Designed for real life:
Tremula works offline. The last known data is always cached, so you're never left with a blank screen. Pull to refresh anytime. Automatic background refresh keeps things current even when the app is closed.

Location is used only to surface events near you — nearby earthquakes, local wildfire detection, aurora visibility at your latitude. Your coordinates go directly from your device to government APIs. We never see them, store them, or share them.

Beautiful on every device:
Dark, cosmic interface designed for night-time use. Full iPad support with a two-column layout and a live global map. Tappable filter tiles. Haptic feedback. A real-time ISS tracker that moves while you watch.

Horse Camp helps horse owners find places to camp, plan trips, and keep important travel details organized before they hit the road.

Built for equestrians, campers, trail riders, and haulers, Horse Camp brings horse-friendly camping information into one simple app. Search for camps, browse map pins, filter for amenities, save favorite places, and plan routes with overnight stops along the way.

Whether you are heading to a weekend trail ride, hauling across the country, or looking for a safe layover for the night, Horse Camp is designed to make trip planning easier.

Features include:

Find Horse-Friendly Camps
Browse a growing list of horse campgrounds, equestrian campsites, public lands, state parks, Recreation.gov locations, private camps, and layover stops.

Search and Filter
Search by location, camp name, park, or facility. Filter by common horse-camping needs such as electric hookups, water, sewer, wash racks, dump stations, bathhouses, pull-through access, stalls, corrals, paddocks, highlines, trails, cabins, and more where available.

Map View
See camps on the map with easy-to-read pin colors by source, including Recreation.gov, State Parks, National Park Service, OpenStreetMap, Layovers, and Private Camps.

Trip Planning
Plan a trip from one place to another and find horse-friendly camps along your route. Save trips, review suggested stops, and keep travel plans organized.

Horse Profile and Documents
Save your horses and keep key travel document information close at hand, including Coggins certificates, health certificates, brand inspections, and vaccination records. Horse documents are stored on your device unless you choose to share them.

Check-In Sharing
Create a simple horse check-in summary when you need to share horse and document status details during travel.

Rig Details
Save your rig type, trailer length, and electric hookup preference to help keep your travel setup organized.

Saved Camps
Mark camps as saved so you can quickly find them again later.

Weather and Wildfire Awareness
View weather information and wildfire-related awareness tools to help make better travel decisions before and during a trip.

Vets and Farriers
Access tools to help locate large animal vets, farriers, feed stores, and emergency services while traveling.

Built for the Horse Community
Horse Camp is made for people who travel with horses and need practical information quickly: where to stay, what amenities are available, how far away a camp is, and what to consider before arriving.

Important Notes
Camp data, amenities, availability, prices, rules, and access can change. Always confirm details directly with the campground, park, land manager, or facility before traveling. Weather, wildfire, road, and emergency information should be used as planning aids only and may not reflect real-time conditions.

Horse Camp is not affiliated with or endorsed by Recreation.gov, the National Park Service, state park systems, OpenStreetMap, Apple, Google, AllTrails, or any campground operator.
